item.text: {"status":"COMPLETE","evidence":["`nl -ba apps/web/app/api/auth/github/callback/route.ts` confirms callback implementation is wired end-to-end: exchanges `code` (line 53), fetches GitHub user (line 54), issues platform session/JWT (line 57), sets HTTP-only session cookie (line 78), returns `201` (line 77).","Same callback route shows contract-compliant error format and failure paths: shared `{ error: { code, message } }` builder (lines 25-35), `400` for denied/missing code (lines 44, 49), mapped OAuth upstream errors via `GithubOAuthError` (lines 82-84), and `500 SERVER_MISCONFIGURED` fallback (line 89).","`nl -ba apps/web/lib/auth/platform-session.ts` and `nl -ba apps/web/app/api/auth/token/route.ts` confirm platform JWT issuance is centralized via `issuePlatformSession(...)` and reused by existing auth token flow (`POST /api/auth/token` sets session cookie at line 51).","`rg -n \"authGithubCallback\" packages/sdk/src/contracts.ts` confirms shared SDK contract includes `ROUTES.authGithubCallback = \"/api/auth/github/callback\"` (line 26).","Scoped docs were updated this iteration: `docs/implementation/implementation-readiness.md` now includes `## Validation Log (2026-03-03 Iteration 3)` with all required command outcomes (`nl -ba ... | sed -n '146,170p'` shows lines 156-161).","Validation PASS: `pnpm --filter @skynet/web lint` -> `✔ No ESLint warnings or errors`.","Validation PASS: `pnpm typecheck` -> `turbo run typecheck` with `Tasks: 4 successful, 4 total`; `pnpm test` -> `@skynet/web` `Test Files 7 passed (7)`, `Tests 24 passed (24)`; `Tasks: 4 successful, 4 total`.","Validation PASS: `pnpm --filter @skynet/web build` -> `✓ Compiled successfully` and build route manifest includes `ƒ /api/auth/github/callback`. Credentials still required for live provider verification: `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID`, `GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET`, `JWT_SECRET`."],"next_step":"Run a live end-to-end OAuth callback smoke test against `/api/auth/github/callback` using real GitHub app credentials and a real authorization `code`.","no_change_justification":"Repository baseline is mostly untracked (`git status --short` shows broad `??` paths, including scoped files), so tracked scoped-diff detectors can report no progress even when work is done. This iteration still made a scoped update in `docs/implementation/implementation-readiness.md` (added Iteration 3 validation log at lines 156-161) and completed the full required validation loop with passing results.","completion_promise":null}
